name: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
description: Production agent runtime on AWS with microVM isolation, 8-hour sessions, persistent memory, browser automation, MCP gateway, and USDC micropayment support.

skills.name: Agent Runtime Hosting
skills.description: Deploy any agent framework to isolated Firecracker microVMs with auto-scaling, 8-hour session limits, and per-session billing.

skills.name: Persistent Agent Memory
skills.description: Store session events and extract long-term insights into managed memory resources accessible across multiple agent invocations.

skills.name: AgentCore Payments
skills.description: Enable agents to make USDC stablecoin micropayments in ~200ms to access paid APIs and MCP servers via the x402 protocol.
